COT Composite Backtest — every report, every trade, 2022 → 2026

Mechanical Positioning + Flow signal from 235 weekly CFTC Disaggregated reports, traded only after each report's verified public release (holiday-shifted calendar; ransomware/shutdown backlog weeks excluded), priced on front-month continuous OHLC with lumber roll gaps neutralized. Gross of costs, sign-only sizing.

OverviewEquityMarkets Bracket labReport browserTrade log Method

01Overview

02Equity — cumulative return per $100k leg

Sum of weekly returns (not compounded). Portfolio = equal-notional mean of active executable legs each report week. Steel-HRC is dealer-assessed cash-settled — scored but never traded (§11.7). Click chips to toggle; hover for the crosshair.

03Per-market outcome

Cumulative adjusted return over all traded weeks. Blue = net positive, red = net negative (diverging by sign).

04Bracket lab — fixed take-profit × stop-loss × time stop

Every executable trade re-simulated with a fixed TP/SL bracket and a time stop, walking daily bars from entry (§7 rules; same-bar TP+SL resolves stop-first — conservative). Pick a hold below; each cell = average return per trade at that TP × SL. Click a cell to load its detail. The weekly-roll baseline (no bracket) is shown for comparison.

05Report browser — what each report said

Every weekly report, factor by factor: managed-money crowding → Positioning, commercial vs retail flow → Flow, the composite lean, and the trade that followed at the first legal print after release. Bracket outcome shown for the selection made in the lab above.

06Trade log — every executable trade

ReportReleasedMarket DirCompL/S wt Entry dateEntry px Exit dateExit px Ret %MFE %MAE %Bracket

07Method & integrity notes

Research artifact, not financial advice. The composite ranks evidence; it does not size positions (methodology §0). All results gross of commissions and spread (§11.6). n-discipline applies: no edge conclusions at this sample (§7.6).
